transfer.listed.headline: ${player.name} placed on transfer list
body: ${fromTeam.name} have listed ${player.name} for transfer with an asking price of ${listing.listingPrice}.
The ${player.primaryRole} becomes available to rival franchises with the listing open until day ${listing.expiresDay}.

transfer.bid_placed.headline: ${toTeam.name} table bid for ${player.name}
body: ${toTeam.name} have submitted a bid of ${bid.amount} for ${fromTeam.name}'s ${player.name}.
Total bids received on the listing now stand at ${listing.totalBids}. The window closes on day ${listing.expiresDay}.

transfer.completed.headline: BLOCKBUSTER: ${player.name} joins ${toTeam.name}
body: ${toTeam.name} have completed the marquee signing of ${player.name} from ${fromTeam.name} in a ${transferFee} deal.
The ${player.primaryRole} ends a spell at ${fromTeam.name} and immediately strengthens ${toTeam.name}'s push for honours this season.
The transfer was settled after ${totalBids} competing bids on the listing.

transfer.completed.headline: ${player.name} signs for ${toTeam.name}
body: ${player.name} has completed a transfer from ${fromTeam.name} to ${toTeam.name} for ${transferFee}.
The ${player.primaryRole} joins his new franchise immediately and is available for selection in upcoming fixtures.

transfer.window_opened.headline: Transfer window opens
body: The off-season transfer window is now open. All ten WPL franchises can list players and submit bids for available talent.
Listings will remain active for ${windowDurationDays} days. Plan early — once the window closes, no further movement is permitted until next off-season.

transfer.window_closed.headline: Transfer window closes
body: The off-season transfer window has now officially closed. A total of ${totalTransfers} player movements were finalised across the WPL.
Squads are now locked until the next off-season trading period.
